scope: narrowed — verify round-1 listed fixes + regressions only; same-wave dependency findings (Task 5/6/7 wave=2 mutual deps) explicitly out of iter2 scope per user instructions

findings.issue: Task 7 still uses `Locale.US` for the suggested-filename `SimpleDateFormat` (AC line 54: 'Locale.US'; hint line 125: `SimpleDateFormat("'sanctum-log-'yyyyMMdd-HHmm'.txt'", Locale.US)`), whereas Task 4 and Task 6 (now aligned to each other in iter2) both use `Locale.ROOT`. All three tasks write the same filename pattern `sanctum-log-YYYYMMDD-HHmm.txt`, so Locale choice should be uniform. Not a regression (this was the Task 7 form on iter1), but worth a single-line sweep while iter2 is open.
findings.fix: Change Task 7 Locale references from `Locale.US` to `Locale.ROOT` (AC bullet and Implementation hint code snippet). `yyyyMMdd-HHmm` is ASCII-only under either locale, so the behavioural result is identical; the edit is purely for cross-task consistency. Not blocking.

task_2.killer_default_companion_consistent: resolved — lines 26, 33, 129, 156 all use `companion object Default : Killer` inside the `Killer` interface; Task 5 line 53/126/142 imports/uses `Killer.Default` by the same name
task_2.java_reflection_clarified: resolved — TDD Anchor line 67 now explicitly calls out `::class.java.declaredMethods` (Java reflection) vs `KClass.declaredMemberFunctions` (Kotlin reflection) and notes `kotlin-reflect` is not on test classpath
task_2.lazy_rationale_corrected: resolved — Details → Files (CrashState) line 128 now explains 'без `lazy`. `filesDir` к моменту инъекции Hilt-синглтона ... уже готов, ленивость ничего не даёт' with the alternative of plain `val` fields
task_2.constructor_seam_hint_rephrased: resolved — lines 127 (Files), 151 (Edge cases), 158 (Implementation hints) now all say 'форма на усмотрение имплементатора: single-method interface, high-order function, что угодно' — no longer prescribes a specific shape

task_4.r1_clarification_note_added: resolved — Verify-user subsection line 124 contains explicit 'R1 (task-decomposition SKILL.md Rules)' paragraph explaining the intentional `verify: [user] → [smoke]` downgrade and the execution-order reason (Task 4 files are backend/plumbing slices not reachable without Task 5/6/7)

task_5.download_repository_filename_clarified: resolved — Context Files 'Code files — read for context' section line 82 now says 'файл называется `DownloadRepository.kt`, а не `DefaultDownloadRepository.kt` — класс `DefaultDownloadRepository` объявлен внутри него'
task_5.killer_default_consistent_with_task_2: resolved — lines 53 (AC), 120 (Implementation hints in Details → Files), 126 (Dependencies), 142 (Implementation hints) all use `Killer.Default` with an explicit 'companion object внутри интерфейса `Killer`' note; matches Task 2 line 129 production declaration

task_6.system_nanotime_as_lambda: resolved — What-to-do step 3 line 37 uses `nowNanos = { System.nanoTime() }`; Implementation hints line 139 adds explicit warning 'именно лямбда `{ System.nanoTime() }`, не `::System.nanoTime` — bound reference к статическому Java-методу не компилируется в Kotlin'
task_6.simpledateformat_matches_task_4: resolved — What-to-do line 35 uses `SimpleDateFormat("yyyyMMdd-HHmm", Locale.ROOT).format(Date())` with the explicit note 'тот же формат и тот же API, что использует Task 4 — `java.time` в проекте не применяется'

task_7.chatscreen_snackbarhost_pattern_accurate: resolved — Description line 24 clarifies `ChatScreen` is split across two composables ('состояние создаётся в внешнем композабле (`ChatScreen.kt:68`) и потребляется во внутреннем private композабле, владеющем `Scaffold` (`ChatScreen.kt:258`)') and that `ModelManagerScreen` is single-composable so state is inline; Context Files line 82 confirms reference lines 68–74 and 258; verified against actual `ChatScreen.kt` (grep: line 68 `val snackbarHostState = remember { SnackbarHostState() }`, line 171 parameter pass, line 258 `snackbarHost = { SnackbarHost(hostState = snackbarHostState) }`)
task_7.contentpadding_call_site_edit_explicit: resolved — What-to-do step 9 line 43 now contains the call-site instruction verbatim: 'также заменить существующий аргумент `contentPadding = innerPadding` на вызове `ModelList` в `ModelManagerScreen.kt:72` на `contentPadding = PaddingValues(0.dp)` — без этой правки отступ удвоится'; confirmed against actual `ModelManagerScreen.kt:72` which indeed reads `contentPadding = innerPadding,`

out_of_scope_preexisting_findings.note: Round 1 critical findings about same-wave depends_on (Task 5 wave=2 depends_on=[2,4] with Task 4 at wave=2; Task 6 wave=2 depends_on=[1,3,4,5] with Task 4/5 at wave=2; Task 7 wave=2 depends_on=[1,2,3,4,5,6] with Tasks 4/5/6 at wave=2) remain unchanged in iter2 task files. Per user iter2 scope instructions, these are explicitly excluded from iter2 re-check and are not counted in status. If the decision is that Wave 2 is a phase label rather than strict parallelism (as stated in Task 5 Details → Dependencies line 129: 'Wave 2 — это фазовая метка, а не строгий параллелизм ... порядок внутри самой Wave 2 задаёт `depends_on`'), these are documented-intentional and should be closed with a project-level note rather than a task-file wave bump. Not blocking iter2 approval.
out_of_scope_preexisting_findings.task_2_minor_todo_marker: Task 2 What-to-do step 3 still contains the `TODO(Task 4): switch to CrashReportActivity::class.java once the class lands` marker and Class.forName-fallback.
